name: SecretFinder
summary: SecretFinder is a python script based on [LinkFinder](https://github.com/GerbenJavado/LinkFinder), written to discover sensitive data like apikeys, accesstoken, authorizations, jwt,..etc in JavaScript files. It does so by using jsbeautifier for python in combination with a fairly large regular expression. The regular expressions consists of four small regular expressions. These are responsible for finding and search anything on js files.

documentation.readme: SecretFinder is a python script based on [LinkFinder](https://github.com/GerbenJavado/LinkFinder), written to discover sensitive data like apikeys, accesstoken, authorizations, jwt,..etc in JavaScript files. It does so by using jsbeautifier for python in combination with a fairly large regular expression. The regular expressions consists of four small regular expressions. These are responsible for finding and search anything on js files.
